<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Array; use Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Abstract\AbstractFunctionCallUnwrapMutator; class UnwrapArrayKeys extends AbstractFunctionCallUnwrapMutator { public const SET = 'Array'; public const DESCRIPTION = 'Unwraps `array_keys` calls.'; public const DIFF = <<<'DIFF' $a = array_keys(['foo' => 1, 'bar' => 2]); // [tl! remove] $a = ['foo' => 1, 'bar' => 2]; // [tl! add] DIFF; public static function functionName(): string { return 'array_keys'; } }
